sources.name: Grand View Research, Home Fragrance Market 2026-2033
sources.note: Global home fragrance estimated at USD 13.16B in 2025, projected to USD 26.51B by 2033; North America was the largest region in 2025; demand is tied to personalized living spaces, relaxation, home decor, and online channels.

sources.name: Market Data Forecast, Reed Fragrance Diffusers Market
sources.note: Commercial market report says reed diffusers dominated fragrance diffusers with 42.3% share in 2025, supported by passive flameless scent release over weeks.

sources.name: ASINSIGHT, Best Selling Reed Diffusers for Home 2026
sources.note: Amazon keyword sample shows large listing density and heavy price concentration: $10-$20 accounted for 42% of tracked products; $20-$50 for 36%; top visible listings show thousands of units sold monthly.

sources.name: Google Trends US 12-month pull via pytrends
sources.note: Pulled on 2026-06-15. Mean relative interest: essential oil diffuser 26.51, reed diffuser 23.04, crystal diffuser 1.94, aroma stone diffuser 0.11, lava stone diffuser 0.06. Trends are directional, not search volume.

sources.name: Amazon, Crystal Stone Aroma Diffuser by Laplosy
sources.note: A crystal aroma stone kit listing at $26.99, 4.5 stars from 8 reviews, includes aroma stones, glass container, and 10ml oil. Product copy emphasizes home decor, giftability, small-space passive diffusion, and refill flexibility.

sources.name: Etsy, Crystal Aroma Stone Diffuser category page
sources.note: Etsy page groups crystal aroma stone diffusers with home fragrance, metaphysical crystals, aromatherapy, reed diffusers, essential oils, and gifts; review snippets emphasize decor, scent, desk/bathroom use, and packaging.

sources.name: Livingetc, How to Use Lava Stone Diffusers
sources.note: Home design media frames lava stone diffusers as a stylish, display-worthy fragrance format; use pattern is 3-10 oil drops, scent lasting roughly 1-3 days, and monthly cleaning.

sources.name: Livingetc, Reed Diffusers vs Electric Diffusers
sources.note: Reed diffusers are described as low-maintenance, soft and steady, best for small/enclosed rooms; electric diffusers provide stronger projection and more control.

sources.name: The Spruce, Best Reed Diffusers Tested
sources.note: Review criteria include scent strength, room size, bottle/reed size, longevity, ingredients, and fragrance preference. This supports scent performance as the real purchase proof.

sources.name: Reddit r/muji, Questions on Aroma Stone / aroma stone experience
sources.note: Consumer comments describe aroma stones as subtle with limited throw, useful close-up but not a full-room diffuser replacement. This is a key performance risk for aroma-stone formats.

sources.name: Made-in-China, Aroma Stone 400+ factories verified
sources.note: Shows hundreds of aroma-stone-related factories and OEM/ODM signals, with example product ranges such as US$2-4 per set, US$3.10-3.79 crystal aroma stone kits, and separate stones below US$1 in volume.

sources.name: McKinsey, The Future of Wellness Trends 2025
sources.note: Gen Z and millennials drive disproportionate wellness spending, experiment with discretionary wellness products, and respond to social proof, value, quality, and perceived efficacy.

sources.name: Religion News Service, For Gen Z, crystals embed spirituality in the planet
sources.note: RNS cites Springtide data: 44% of young people ages 13-25 engage with crystals or herbs as a spiritual exercise, and 21% do so at least weekly. This supports a light-mystic hook but not medical/healing claims.

sources.name: Herz et al., A three-factor benefits framework for scented household products
sources.note: Search-visible article data: among 2,000 US consumers, a good-smelling home made respondents feel clean, relaxed, accomplished, confident, and organized; this supports state-shift positioning.

sources.name: Rucia 1688 screenshot scout, 2026-06-15
sources.note: User-provided 1688 screenshots showed complete-looking crystal aroma gift sets roughly in ¥18.5-74.5, realistic benchmark range ¥27-58, and many bait/component prices below ¥10 that should not be treated as full kit COGS.

decision.categoryBridge: flameless room scent kit with aroma stones, crystals, fragrance oil, and mood card
